goal: Fix all Dogfood #4 findings D-1 through D-8 in playwright-cli-axi

summary.title: Fix Dogfood #4 findings D-1..D-8 (dialogs, tabs, snapshots, console)
summary.what: Resolved all eight Dogfood #4 findings in playwright-cli-axi. Native dialogs (D-1) are handled atomically via a --dialog flag on click/dblclick, with a post-click modal-pending detector and an actionable modal_pending error; standalone snapshot (D-2) writes its tree to a cache file matching navigation shape; all four tab commands (D-3) return one tab_rows table with the real un-mangled URL (D-4); check/uncheck/press (D-5) capture a post-action snapshot and report checked state; ANSI escapes (D-6) are stripped from error messages; console (D-7) returns totals + a messages table and pdf/screenshot/state-save lift their link into a file field; spawned tabs (D-8) surface as new_tabs[] piggy-backed on the existing validation probe for zero extra round-trips. Added src/domain/resultShapes.ts (stripAnsi, isUrlLike, parseTabList, parseConsoleMessages).
summary.why: Dogfooding against the-internet.herokuapp.com found these surfaces broken or unstructured for agents: dialogs wedged the session, tabs/snapshots were double-encoded, interaction commands returned {}, and error/artifact output leaked escapes or markdown. These blocked real agent flows, so each fix was verified live against the same app.
summary.user_goal: Fix all Dogfood #4 findings D-1 through D-8 in playwright-cli-axi

decisions.point: How to detect spawned tabs (D-8) without adding round-trip latency
decisions.chose: Piggy-back page/context info onto the existing post-click validation probe (0 extra upstream calls)
decisions.rationale: Each upstream call is ~1-2s; a separate before/after page-count probe would regress click latency, which the dogfooding was meant to improve.

decisions.point: How to detect a pending modal without disposing the dialog (D-1)
decisions.chose: Reuse the validation probe's run-code failure ('does not handle the modal state') as a zero-cost modal detector, surfacing dialog:{pending:true}
decisions.rationale: run-code fails non-destructively when a modal is pending; no extra upstream call needed.

decisions.point: How to keep D-5 wiring from rotting untested
decisions.chose: Added integration tests in main.spec that queue the real [check,snapshot] sequence and assert checked state + upstreamRuns
decisions.rationale: A reviewer found the D-5 wiring (runSnapshotText->postSnapshot->refIsChecked) could be deleted with all tests green because presenter tests injected postSnapshot directly.

review_notes: 3 fresh-context reviewers (correctness, simplicity, tests). Applied the fixes-worth-doing-now: D-5 integration test (RED-1 test gap), runDialogHandle exit-code guard (false handled on non-modal failure), corrected vacuous D-8 negative assertion. Deferred optional: parseTabList ]-in-title robustness, isUrlLike/modal_pending direct unit coverage, fast-check properties for new parsers.
